title: Merger and consolidation
doc_html:
§1098.  Merger and consolidation

Professional architectural corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional architectural corporations.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.

§1098.  Merger and consolidation
Professional architectural corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional architectural corporations.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.
